Why Leads Up

Built for the businesses
Google sends leads to.

Instant Lead Response

Reply to every inquiry in under 60 seconds, 24/7, across phone, SMS, and email.

Revenue Recovery

Re-engage lost or cold leads automatically so no opportunity slips through the cracks.

Built for Service Businesses

Works with HVAC, plumbing, cleaning, landscaping, legal, dental, and more.

How It Works

From inquiry to booked appointment
in three steps.

1

A lead comes in

From your website, Google, or phone — every inquiry is captured instantly, no matter the channel.

2

AI responds instantly

Leads Up qualifies, books, or routes them in under 60 seconds — day or night, weekend or holiday.

3

You close the deal

Focus on the work you love. Your calendar fills with qualified appointments, not cold outreach.

The System

A single revenue layer. Replacing your entire follow-up stack.

Leads Up connects to your existing tools and runs your pipeline like a top-performing SDR team — at 1/10th the cost.

01

Capture

Every form, ad, DM, and inbound source is unified into one revenue stream — instantly enriched and scored.

02

Engage

AI agents reply in under 60 seconds across SMS, email, and chat — with brand-perfect tone and full context.

03

Qualify

Multi-turn conversations qualify intent, budget, and timing — then hand off only sales-ready leads.

04

Book

Calls land directly on your calendar. Reminders, reschedules, and no-show recovery run automatically.

Platform

Built like infrastructure.
Used like magic.

AI follow-up that never sleeps

Conversational agents trained on your offer respond instantly across every channel — including the 80% of leads humans never reach.

Booked calls, not busy work

Every qualified conversation auto-converts into a calendar booking with reminders, confirmations, and re-engagement built in.

Revenue-grade analytics

Every touchpoint, reply, and booking tied back to pipeline impact. Know exactly what's working — and scale it.

Plug into your stack

Native integrations with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, GHL, Calendly, Slack, Stripe — and 1,000+ via API.

Trained on your brand

Voice, tone, objections, edge cases — your AI agent operates with the precision of your best closer.

Enterprise-ready

SOC 2, GDPR, end-to-end encryption, role-based access. Built for teams who can't afford to play.

FAQ

Questions, answered.

What exactly does LeadsUp do?

Leads Up is an AI-powered lead conversion system. When a potential customer reaches out — by phone, text, web form, or email — Leads Up responds instantly, qualifies the lead, and either books them or routes them to your team. It works 24/7 so you never miss an opportunity.

How is this different from a marketing agency?

A marketing agency brings leads to your door. Leads Up makes sure those leads actually turn into paying customers. We do not run ads — we convert the leads you are already getting but losing to slow response times or missed calls.

How fast can we go live?

Most businesses are fully set up within 48 hours. Our team handles the configuration, connects your existing tools, and trains the AI on your business before going live.

What tools do you integrate with?

Leads Up integrates with Google Calendar, HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, Jobber, ServiceTitan, and more. If you use a CRM or scheduling tool, we almost certainly connect to it.

Is my data secure?

Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We follow SOC 2 security standards and never share your customer data with third parties.

What if AI replies do not sound like our brand?

We train the AI on your tone, your services, and your business before going live. You review and approve the response templates and can edit them anytime from your dashboard.

Do you offer a guarantee?

Yes. If you do not see measurable improvement in lead response rate within the first 30 days, we will work with you for free until you do.

Stop losing leads.

Start compounding revenue.
